# Outflows — Bills Tracker: Full Reference

> Track bills, subscriptions, and recurring payments in one place. Never miss a due date or pay a late fee again.

Outflows is a mobile app for iOS and Android that gives users a calm, clean overview of all their monthly obligations — bills, subscriptions, recurring charges, and one-off payments. The design philosophy is simplicity: fast to update, easy to scan, and clear enough to trust every day.

**Website:** https://pcristo.dev/outflows_website/  
**Made by:** Paulo Cristo

---

## Core Concept

Most people lose money not because they can't afford their bills, but because they forget them. Outflows solves this by making every upcoming payment visible before it becomes a problem.

- Monthly outlook shows total planned spend at a glance
- Due dates are surfaced week by week so nothing sneaks up
- One unified view for all recurring and one-off payments

---

## Features

### Monthly Outlook
A top-level dashboard showing:
- Total planned spend for the month (e.g., "$1,284 planned")
- On-track / at-risk status
- Number of bills due this week
- Potential late fees avoided

### Due Date Tracking
See every upcoming bill at a glance. The app surfaces what's due this week, what's coming up soon, and what's overdue — so you can act before it costs you.

### Unified Bill Tracking
Track in one place:
- Rent and mortgage
- Utilities (electricity, water, internet, phone)
- Subscriptions (streaming, SaaS, gym)
- One-off and irregular payments

### Recurring & One-Off Support
Mark any bill as recurring (monthly, weekly, annual) or as a one-time payment. Outflows handles both without clutter.

---

## Design Philosophy

Built for real life. The app is:
- **Fast to update** — Add or check off a bill in seconds
- **Easy to scan** — Clean layout with no unnecessary information density
- **Trustworthy** — Consistent, predictable UI so you can rely on it daily

---

## Availability

- iOS (App Store) — Free
- Android (Google Play) — Free
